query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Prophesy', 'To speak or write with divine inspiration', 'Over time, the community learned to prophesy its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Protagonist', 'The main character in a literary work or drama', 'Scholars noted a striking protagonist between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Protean', 'Able to change or adapt easily', 'Critics argued that the plan might protean the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Provincial', 'Belonging or peculiar to a particular province', 'Over time, the community learned to provincial its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Provisional', 'Temporary or conditional', '“His license was provisional until he passed the final test.”', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Proviso', 'A conditional provision to an agreement', 'Over time, the community learned to proviso its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Provocation', 'The act of annoying someone into doing something', 'Her provocation became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Provocative', 'Causing anger or another strong reaction', 'The passage presents a provocative portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Prowess', 'Skillfulness and manual ability, adroitness or dexterity', 'Her prowess became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Proximity', 'Closeness', 'Her proximity became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Proxy', 'The power of a person authorized to act in place of another', 'Over time, the community learned to proxy its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Prudent', 'Acting with care and good judgment', 'What seemed prudent at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),

  ('Prurient', 'Overly sexual', 'The reviewer described the tone as prurient, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
